name: Settings

entities: Setting { key, group, label, description, type: 'text'|'toggle'|'select'|'secret', value }
Integration { key, name, connected: boolean, detail }

customization_points: the set of setting groups + fields (app-specific)
whether secrets are stored server-side (vault) or write-only
notes: v0.1: manifest + settings design mockup (grouped sections: general / integrations / notifications). Code template pending SOF-109's template-framework decision. Secrets should ride the app's existing vault path, never plaintext in a setting value; see docs/design/component-library.md.
